[Vf. u 44-12/2010-"^.:5t."57:l.-II] OTC. ^ . 9f|c||W=i, TPpffi ^ f e MINISTRY OF HOME AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 5th October, 2010 S.0.2419(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by clause (b) of Sub-Section (2) of Section 3 of the Disaster Management Act, 2005 (53 of 2005), the Chairperson of the National Disaster Management Authority has nominated the following persons as members of said Authority, namely:— (i) Shri M.S. Reddy, MLA (ii) Shri T. Nandakumar, IAS (Retd.) (iii) Maj. Gen. (Retd.) J.K. Bansal, VSM, Chikitsa Rattan f F. No. 44-12/2010-NDM-U| R. K. SRIVASTAVA, Jt.
